info.title: EVE Build Calculator API
info.summary: Read-only lookups against the bundled EVE Online Static Data Export (SDE).
info.description: Public, unauthenticated JSON endpoints for resolving an EVE Online `typeID` to its SDE record, and for finding the manufacturing blueprint that produces a given product `typeID`. Data is sourced from CCP's official SDE (https://developers.eveonline.com/static-data).

get.summary: Look up an SDE type record by typeID
get.description: Returns the raw JSONL row from CCP's SDE `types.jsonl` for the given typeID. Use `name.en` (or `name` when it is a plain string) to read the item's English name.

parameters.name: typeID
parameters.description: EVE Online typeID — a positive integer.

404.description: typeID is not present in the bundled SDE.

get.summary: Find the blueprint that builds a given product typeID
get.description: Given the typeID of an item you want to build, returns the raw SDE blueprint record whose `activities.manufacturing.products[].typeID` matches. Inspect `activities.manufacturing.materials` for the bill of materials and `activities.manufacturing.time` for the base build time.

parameters.name: typeID
parameters.description: Product typeID — the item you want to build.

404.description: No manufacturing blueprint in the bundled SDE produces that typeID.

get.summary: Look up a solar system by solarSystemID
get.description: Returns the raw JSONL row from CCP's SDE `mapSolarSystems.jsonl` for the given solarSystemID. The row's `_key` is the solarSystemID. Resolve `constellationID` via /api/constellation/{id}, `regionID` via /api/region/{id}, and `factionID` via the SDE factions data. New Eden systems use ids in the 30000000–30999999 range.

parameters.name: systemID
parameters.description: EVE Online solarSystemID — a positive integer.

404.description: solarSystemID is not present in the bundled SDE.

get.summary: Look up a constellation by constellationID
get.description: Returns the raw JSONL row from CCP's SDE `mapConstellations.jsonl`. The row's `_key` is the constellationID. Use `regionID` to walk up to the region and `solarSystemIDs` to enumerate member systems.

parameters.name: constellationID
parameters.description: EVE Online constellationID — a positive integer.

404.description: constellationID is not present in the bundled SDE.

get.summary: Look up a region by regionID
get.description: Returns the raw JSONL row from CCP's SDE `mapRegions.jsonl`. The row's `_key` is the regionID.

parameters.name: regionID
parameters.description: EVE Online regionID — a positive integer.

404.description: regionID is not present in the bundled SDE.

get.summary: Look up a stargate by stargateID
get.description: Returns the raw JSONL row from CCP's SDE `mapStargates.jsonl`. The row's `_key` is the stargateID; follow its destination to walk system connectivity.

parameters.name: stargateID
parameters.description: EVE Online stargateID — a positive integer.

404.description: stargateID is not present in the bundled SDE.

get.summary: Look up a star by starID
get.description: Returns the raw JSONL row from CCP's SDE `mapStars.jsonl`. The row's `_key` is the starID.

parameters.name: starID
parameters.description: EVE Online starID — a positive integer.

404.description: starID is not present in the bundled SDE.

get.summary: Look up an NPC station by stationID
get.description: Returns the JSONL row from CCP's SDE `npcStations.jsonl` for the given stationID (the row's `_key`), enriched with: `name` (the human-readable station name from ESI, when available), `solarSystemId` (resolve via /api/system/{id}), and `regionId` (resolved by walking the station's solar system; resolve via /api/region/{id}). All original SDE fields — including CCP's `solarSystemID` — are preserved.

parameters.name: stationID
parameters.description: EVE Online stationID — a positive integer.

200.description: SDE NPC station record enriched with name, solarSystemId, and regionId.

example.name: Jita IV - Moon 4 - Caldari Navy Assembly Plant

404.description: stationID is not present in the bundled SDE.

LocalizedName.description: CCP returns names either as a plain string or as a per-locale object. Read `.en` when it's an object.

TypeRecord.description: Raw row from CCP's SDE `types.jsonl`. Only the most commonly used fields are listed; the actual payload contains many more.

_key.description: Alternative key used in some SDE rows when `typeID` is absent.

marketGroupID.description: Present when the type is sellable on the in-game market.

Position.description: Cartesian coordinates (metres) in the New Eden universe.

SolarSystemRecord.description: Raw row from CCP's SDE `mapSolarSystems.jsonl`. `_key` is the solarSystemID. Only commonly used fields are listed; the payload contains more.

ConstellationRecord.description: Raw row from CCP's SDE `mapConstellations.jsonl`. `_key` is the constellationID.

RegionRecord.description: Raw row from CCP's SDE `mapRegions.jsonl`. `_key` is the regionID.

MapItemRecord.description: Raw row from one of CCP's SDE celestial/structure files (`mapStargates`, `mapStars`, `npcStations`). `_key` is the item's id. Field set varies by file; common members shown.

_key.description: The item id (stargateID, planetID, moonID, etc.).

solarSystemID.description: Containing system, when present; resolve via /api/system/{id}.

typeID.description: SDE type of the item, when present; resolve via /api/type/{id}.

NpcStationRecord.description: Row from CCP's SDE `npcStations.jsonl` (`_key` is the stationID), enriched by this API with `name`, `solarSystemId`, and `regionId`. All original SDE fields are preserved alongside the added ones.

solarSystemID.description: CCP's original field — the containing solar system.

name.description: Human-readable station name from ESI, when resolvable.

regionId.description: Containing region (resolved via the station's solar system); resolve via /api/region/{id}.
